tasks.description: A minimalist designer's portfolio. Single column, lots of negative space, very restrained.
A small neighborhood Italian restaurant. Traditional, warm, no flashy graphics.
A personal blog by a single writer. Posts-first, no marketing fluff.
A typical SaaS startup marketing site for a productivity tool called Tempo.
A two-day design conference called LAYOUT 2026.
Landing site for a habit-tracking mobile app called Loop.
An online newspaper called The Western Tribune.
Technical documentation site for a fake CLI tool called 'orbit'.
An online store selling minimalist home goods.
An admin dashboard for a fake B2B SaaS analytics tool.
